class.name: MaszynaTrianglesImporter
class.brief_description: Parses MaSzyna triangle nodes into transformed arrays.
class.description: Utility class used by the scenery loader to parse [code]triangles[/code] node payloads from a [code]MaszynaParser[/code] and return texture, vertex, normal, and UV arrays already transformed into world space.

method.name: import_triangles
method.description: Parses a [code]triangles[/code] node from the current parser position.
